since_last: 25% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads -0.31%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 25% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.15% · BTC -0.24% · Gold -1.14% · Nasdaq100 -0.83%. 25% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at -0.31%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.31%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.67%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -7.69%
cards.body: Leaders: ISRG +3.18%, AVAV +2.99%, BIDU +2.89%, ZBRA +1.87%, OKTA +1.30%. Laggards: SKHY -7.69%, CEVA -7.51%, SMR -6.76%, ARM -6.69%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.24% at $136.95
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.24% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
